name: Vermicelli Salad
directions: Break vermicelli in half and cook in boiling water for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from fire, cover and let stand 10 minutes.
Stir well and drain in colander.
Rinse in cold water, drain, and place in large mixing bowl.
Add mayonnaise, lemon juice and grated onion.
Mix well.
Add remainder of ingredients.
Taste and add more mayonnaise and seasonings if needed.
You may want to add salt.
Chill for several hours.

similar.name: Sesame Pasta Salad With Red Peppers and Snow Peas

name: some sort of salad
directions: Mix mix mix and mix.
eat now or put in fridge and eat later.

similar.name: Sesame Pasta Salad With Red Peppers and Snow Peas

name: Pesto Dip
directions: Serve with raw veggies such as broccoli, cherry tomatoes, bell pepper strips and zucchini.
Mix all ingredients (except veggies).
Cover and refrigerate 2 hours before serving.

name: Best ever Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to the box and drain.
Set aside.
Chop all veggies, meats and cheese into small bite size pieces.
Mix together the oil, ving, and spices for the dressing.
Combine all ingredients together and chill over night.

similar.name: Sesame Pasta Salad With Red Peppers and Snow Peas

name: Mostaccioli Salad
directions: Prepare noodles as directed on package.
Combine other ingredients,except parsely and pimentos, in large bowl:Add cooked noodles.
Add parsley flakes and pimentos to taste.
Refrigerate overnight.
Serve cold or at room temperature.

name: Oriental Coleslaw (#2)
directions: Toast the slivered almonds.
Suggest place them in a microwave safe pie plate and nuke on high for 3 minutes.
Set aside.
Mix olive oil, vinegar, sugar and seasoning packet together until sugar is dissolved (I shake it).
Set aside.
In a large bowl mix the cole slaw, onions, sunflower seeds and almonds.
Pour the dressing over the mixture and blend.
Chill in the fridge for at least 2 hours (Mixture will go down about 1/2 in volume).
Break up the ramen noodles (I use a plastic bag).
Just before serving mix the noodles in with the other ingredients.

name: Fabulous Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together until well blended.
Refrigerate 4-5 hours before serving.
Serve with assorted crackers or chips.

name: Aunt Lorraine's Linguini Salad
directions: Mix everything together in a big mixing bowl.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
~NOTE~Best when refrigerated overnight!

similar.name: Sesame Pasta Salad With Red Peppers and Snow Peas

name: Vermicelli Salad
directions: Cook vermicelli in boiling water, stirring constantly.
Drain and blanch with cold water.
Add onion, green pepper, parsley, celery seed, chives, oregano, shrimp or crabmeat, if you are adding it and Italian dressing.
Moisten well with the mayonnaise, adding more if necessary.
Add salt and pepper to taste.

similar.name: Sesame Pasta Salad With Red Peppers and Snow Peas

name: Herbed Garlic Cheese Spread
directions: In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, butter and seasonings until well blended.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Serve with your favorite crackers.

name: Sesame Pasta Salad With Red Peppers and Snow Peas
directions: In a large salad bowl, toss together all the ingredients except the lettuce leaves.
Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Check to see if the seasoning is to your taste. Adjust accordingly.
Add a few drops of lemon juice or tamari or soy sauce.
Line 4 serving bowls with lettuce leaves.
Spoon salad into each and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Shrimp in Dijon Vinaigrette
directions: Cook shrimp in boiling salted water until pink. Usually 2 1/2 to 3 minutes. Drain and transfer to a large bowl.
Combine remaining ingredients and pour over warm shrimp. Toss well so every shrimp is coated.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 to 10 hours (overnight is best). Drain excess sauce from shrimp before serving.
